title: Prefer Pandas DataFrame to NumPy when converting DataFrame to array
description: Using Pandas DataFrame to NumPy should be preferred over using the DataFrame's values attribute for better performance and consistency.
message: Prefer using the 'to_numpy()' method instead of the 'values' attribute for DataFrame to NumPy conversion.
recommendation: Use the 'to_numpy()' method instead of the 'values' attribute.

references.description: Pandas documentation on converting DataFrame to NumPy array

noncompliant.description: Using the 'values' attribute to convert DataFrame to array

compliant.description: Using the 'to_numpy()' method to convert DataFrame to array

why_is_this_an_issue: Using 'values' attribute can lead to performance issues due to the conversion process and potential inconsistencies with other Pandas operations.
how_to_fix: Replace the usage of 'values' attribute with the 'to_numpy()' method.

metadata.title: Prefer Pandas DataFrame to NumPy when converting DataFrame to array
